title: Talyer+ Landing Page Concept
summary: A landing-page concept for a car service booking app focused on structure, clarity, and product introduction.
challenge: Communicate a service-booking product quickly through a single landing page.
approach: Organized the page around a clear product narrative and visual scanning path.
Used a clean layout language aimed at presentation and usability.
results: Useful as a supporting project that shows page composition skills and conversion-oriented framing.

sections.heading: Portfolio role
paragraphs: This project remains in the archive section because it supports the broader story without competing with the more commercially relevant work from recent roles.
